description:
A desktop utility that automatically backs up your computer to BeeDrive

BeeDrive for desktop is a desktop utility that automatically backs up your computer to BeeDrive. It includes folder-level file sync with customizable options for sync direction, file size, and file type.
Fixed issues
- Fixed an issue where users may not receive two-factor authentication codes on iOS and macOS version 26.4 when enabling iCloud Photos backup.
- Fixed an issue where image text recognition (OCR) might not be successful on Windows computer with certain GPU environment.
